name: compliance trace: each framework entry records fetched_at + edition (e.g. NIST CSF 2.0 vs 1.1) per section 2.8 compliance_state schema
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/provenance .claude-tdd-pro/compliance-last-fetch && echo "2026-05-13T08:00:00Z" > .claude-tdd-pro/compliance-last-fetch/nist-csf-2.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/consumption-trace.sh" --commit-sha abc --consulted-compliance nist-csf-2 --edition "NIST CSF 2.0" --emit "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/provenance/abc.json" && grep "2026-05-13T08:00:00Z" .claude-tdd-pro/provenance/abc.json 1>&2 && grep "NIST CSF 2.0" .claude-tdd-pro/provenance/abc.json 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
